description_long: This is a tall, rectangular shelving unit with a modern, minimalist design, featuring a combination of open shelves and closed compartments. The structure is primarily composed of a light-colored material, likely painted or laminated wood, with two distinct doors in a muted blue-gray tone that contrast with the rest of the unit. The front face is divided into multiple cuboid sections, some open for display or storage and others concealed behind the doors. The sides and back are solid and unadorned, emphasizing the clean lines and functional form. The overall appearance suggests it is suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or residential entryways. The unit stands on a flat base, with no visible legs or feet, and does not appear to have any glass panels or decorative hardware.
description: A tall, modern shelving unit with open and closed compartments in light gray and blue-gray tones, featuring a clean, minimalist design. The front has multiple shelves and two solid doors, while the sides and back are plain.
description_view_0: Front view showing multiple open shelves and two blue-gray doors arranged asymmetrically.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the unit's slim depth and solid, featureless side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unbroken back panel with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the first side, showing a solid, flat surface.
